'''Crimson slugs''' were predators that lived in the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]]. They could be found in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The crimson slugs were variants of the [[Exogorth/Legends|exogorth]] space slugs.<ref name="WEG" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Lost Destiny|book=Tapani Sector Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
